svg.title: Valkyrja exception and throwable hierarchy
svg.desc: Full naming convention and inheritance hierarchy for Valkyrja throwables and exceptions, from language root through framework base to component and subcomponent levels.
svg.text: name is unique · not shared across components
shared across Http · Cli · Queue etc.
concrete · one per throw site or group
1. Is the subcomponent name shared across components?
2. Does the subcomponent have 2+ exceptions of the same category?
Yes → add abstract *RuntimeException / *InvalidArgumentException · No → extend framework base directly
3. Does each throw site need its own exception?
Always yes → concrete, named for the problem, never throw an abstract
